title: aster ageratoides var. alatopetiolatus
intro: Aster ageratoides var. alatopetiolatus, also known as the Chinese mountain aster or Qiao Mai, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family, native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aster ageratoides var. alatopetiolatus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often dried or made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
